info.title: CodeSearch Management API
info.description:
HTTP management API for the `codesearch serve` command. Exposes codesearch operations over REST/JSON and Server-Sent Events (SSE), separate from the MCP protocol server.

This document is checked in at `docs/management-api.openapi.json` and served verbatim at `GET /api/openapi.json`.

## Streaming (SSE) endpoints

Paths under `/api/stream/` respond with `text/event-stream`. Each frame is a named SSE event (`event:`) with a JSON `data:` payload. A terminal `done` or `error` event is always the last frame; clients treat either as end-of-stream. If the client disconnects, the server drops the in-flight work. The precise `event` names and payloads are documented per-path below and, because OpenAPI cannot express SSE frame shapes natively, mirrored in the `SseEvent*` component schemas.

## REST endpoints (stacked PR #2)

The non-streaming `/api/...` REST endpoints (search, repositories, stats, etc.) are added by the sibling PR and are described generically here under `See `x-note``. Their exact request/response schemas should be reconciled into this document once that PR merges.

servers.description: Local management server (default bind). Use 0.0.0.0 when started with --public.

tags.name: rest
tags.description: Non-streaming command endpoints (owned by stacked PR #2).

get.description: Self-describing document listing the currently available endpoints. Also served at `/`.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: The symbol whose call flow to explain. Interpreted as a regex when the request body sets `regex: true`.

get.description:
Streams the LLM's explanation of a symbol's bidirectional call flow token by token.

**Response is `text/event-stream`.** Events, in order:
- `token` — one chunk of the explanation; payload `{ "text": string }`. Zero or more.
- `done` — terminal summary; payload `SseExplainDone`. Exactly one on success.
- `error` — terminal failure; payload `{ "message": string }`. Replaces `done` on failure.

If the symbol is ambiguous (matches several fully-qualified names), no `token` events are emitted and the `done` event carries `status: "ambiguous"` with a `candidates` list instead of an explanation.

No request body is required for `GET`; use `POST` to pass options.

200.description: SSE stream of `token` events followed by a terminal `done` or `error` event.

post.description: Same as the `GET` form, but accepts an optional JSON body of options.

200.description: SSE stream of `token` events followed by a terminal `done` or `error` event.

post.description:
Indexes a repository path and streams coarse lifecycle progress.

**Response is `text/event-stream`.** Events, in order:
- `progress` — a lifecycle update; payload `{ "stage": string, "message": string }`. `stage` is `started` first, then periodic `running` heartbeats.
- `done` — terminal summary; payload `SseIndexDone`. Exactly one on success.
- `error` — terminal failure; payload `{ "message": string }`. Replaces `done` on failure.

Progress is coarse (start / running heartbeats / done) because the underlying use case does not yet expose a per-file progress channel.

200.description: SSE stream of `progress` events followed by a terminal `done` or `error` event.

version.description: Crate version of the running server.

ExplainStreamRequest.description: Optional options for the explain stream. All fields optional.

repository.description: Restrict the explanation to a single repository (name or UUID).

regex.description: Interpret the `{symbol}` path segment as a regular expression.

llm.description: LLM backend to use. Defaults to `anthropic`.

path.description: Filesystem path of the repository to index.

name.description: Optional human-readable name (defaults to the directory name).

force.description: Force a full re-index, discarding existing data for this path.

SseExplainEvent.description: One SSE frame emitted by `/api/stream/explain/{symbol}`. `event` names the frame; `data` is the JSON payload. Modelled as a union for documentation — the wire format is SSE, not JSON.

SseTokenEvent.description: `event: token` — one chunk of streamed explanation text.

SseErrorEvent.description: `event: error` — terminal failure. Last frame of the stream.

SseExplainDoneEvent.description: `event: done` — terminal success for the explain stream.

explanation.description: Full post-processed Markdown explanation (also delivered incrementally as `token` events).

SseIndexDoneEvent.description: `event: done` — terminal success for the index stream.

x-note: The non-streaming REST endpoints under `/api/...` (e.g. search, repositories, stats) are owned by stacked PR #2 and are intentionally not enumerated here to avoid churn. Once PR #2 merges, add their paths, request bodies, and response schemas to this document. The streaming endpoints and the skeleton endpoints (/health, /api, /api/openapi.json) above are precise and stable.
